domain: Spider orb-web radial+spiral capture architecture: 15-35 radial structural threads + concentric sticky spiral capture threads.
specific_mechanism: Sparse geometry: radial spokes + concentric spiral; each prey-impact-point covered by overlay of nearest radial + spiral pass.
llm_application: WEB-SPIRAL: sparse attention pattern. N evenly-distributed radial 'anchor' positions + M concentric spiral arcs sweeping increasing radius from center. Attention computed only at radial×spiral intersections.
novelty_claim: Radial Attention (2506.19852) already implements radial sparse attention with energy decay. Sparse Transformer / Longformer / BigBird use strided + block + global. Pi-Attention uses periodic. WEB-SPIRAL is dominated by Radial Attention.
